lessons.title: Defences Contributory Negligence and the Civil Liability Act 1961
lessons.description: What is contributory negligence? Contributory negligence arises where the plaintiff's own failure to take reasonable care for their own safety contributed to the damage they suffered.

lessons.title: Defences Volenti Non Fit Injuria and Limitation of Actions
lessons.description: Volenti non fit injuria — the Latin phrase means: to one who consents, no injury is done. This is the defence of voluntary assumption of risk.
